business_info.name: Central Skylights
business_info.service_area: Greater Melbourne (South East, West, North West Melbourne and North of Melbourne)

google_business_profile.evidence: Knowledge Graph visible in SERP for brand query 'skylights melbourne'

knowledge_graph_data.title: Central Skylights | Velux Skylights Melbourne
knowledge_graph_data.subtitle: Skylight contractor in Noble Park, Australia

reviews.assessment: Exceptional review profile — 313 reviews at 5.0 stars is outstanding for a local skylight contractor. This is a strong competitive advantage.

gbp_issues: GBP shows 'Noble Park' but LocalBusiness schema on website uses 'Dandenong' as addressLocality — NAP mismatch
Knowledge graph shows no logo_url (null) — GBP profile image may be missing or not connected
Knowledge graph shows no image_url (null) — profile photos not surfacing in knowledge panel

discrepancies: Street address: '2/21 Tower Court' (contact page) vs '88 Cheltenham Road' (schema) — different streets entirely
Suburb: Noble Park (contact page + GBP) vs Dandenong (schema) — different suburbs
Postcode: 3174 (contact page + GBP) vs 3175 (schema) — different postcodes
Note: Noble Park 3174 and Dandenong 3175 are adjacent suburbs — likely the business moved or has multiple locations, but schema has not been updated
nap_consistency.impact: NAP inconsistency between schema and GBP/contact page is a significant local ranking factor issue. Google may show incorrect address information or reduce confidence in location signals.

skylights_melbourne.note: No 3-pack shown for 'skylights melbourne' — SERP is product-intent dominated with organic and shopping results. Central ranks at organic position 4.

skylight_installation_melbourne.note: Local pack exists for 'skylight installation melbourne' but Central Skylights does not appear in it — key gap. Local pack businesses were not extractable from API but 3-pack is active for this query.

central_in_brand_serp.notes: Strong branded SERP — reviews sites, social profiles all present

local_content.performance: Suburb pages are working — /skylights-mornington/ ranks position 2 for 'skylights mornington' (50 SV)

local_sitemap.note: Local sitemap only contains 1 URL (locations.kml) — not utilising sitemap for local pages

issues: LocalBusiness schema has wrong address (88 Cheltenham Rd Dandenong 3175) vs actual location Noble Park 3174
Schema @type is 'LocalBusiness' — should be more specific: 'HomeAndConstructionBusiness' or 'GeneralContractor' or 'HomeImprovement'
openingHoursSpecification uses 08.30 as opens time (with period instead of colon) — may not parse correctly
Organization schema email value is 'admin' — not a valid email format
Missing geo coordinates (latitude/longitude) in LocalBusiness schema
Missing hasMap property linking to Google Maps
Missing aggregateRating within LocalBusiness schema (separate Product schema has rating but not LocalBusiness)

notable_citations_found: central-skylights.myshopify.com (old Shopify store — 281 backlinks, may be a duplicate business listing)
citations_and_directories.backlink_concern: vtimes.com.au has 45,319 links to centralskylights.com.au — this appears to be a link network/farm. This volume of links from a single domain is a potential Google penalty risk.
citations_and_directories.niche_relevant_domains: Low — most referring domains are web directories, not skylight/home improvement industry sites

reviews_and_reputation.discrepancy: Schema shows 293 reviews but GBP shows 313 — schema needs updating
reviews_and_reputation.review_response_strategy: Cannot assess from available data — should be verified manually
other_review_platforms: Facebook reviews (confirmed — Facebook page at position 2 for brand query)

skylight_repair_melbourne.gap: Site ranks position 12 for repair query but no dedicated repair page — opportunity to move into top 5

strengths: 313 x 5-star reviews on Google — exceptional social proof
Knowledge Graph presence for brand query — strong GBP setup
Suburb location pages working (Mornington at pos 2)
GBP confirmed active with strong reviews
buy.nsw.gov.au citation is strong trust signal
critical_issues: NAP inconsistency: schema address (88 Cheltenham Rd, Dandenong 3175) contradicts contact page and GBP (Noble Park 3174) — fix schema immediately
Central Skylights not in local pack for 'skylight installation melbourne' — missing 3-pack visibility
vtimes.com.au link spam (45k+ links from one domain) is a potential penalty risk
LocalBusiness schema on wrong page URL (#id is homepage, schema should also be on /contact/)
actions: Immediately fix LocalBusiness schema address to match GBP: 2/21 Tower Court, Noble Park VIC 3174
Update schema aggregateRating to match current 313 review count
Investigate and potentially disavow vtimes.com.au link network
Add GBP posts regularly to strengthen local ranking signals
Create more suburb pages for high-density Melbourne suburbs not yet targeted
